inputs.label: Initial Cost
inputs.businessContext: The purchase price or initial cost of the asset.

businessContext_i18n.en: The purchase price or initial cost of the asset.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın satın alma fiyatı veya başlangıç maliyeti.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: The estimated residual value at the end of useful life.

businessContext_i18n.en: The estimated residual value at the end of useful life.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faydalı ömür sonunda tahmini hurda değeri.

inputs.label: Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: The expected useful life of the asset in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: The expected useful life of the asset in years.

inputs.label: Depreciation Factor
inputs.businessContext: The multiplying factor for straight-line rate (e.g., 2 for double-declining balance).

businessContext_i18n.en: The multiplying factor for straight-line rate (e.g., 2 for double-declining balance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrusal amortisman oranı için çarpan faktör (örneğin, çift azalan bakiyeler için 2).

inputs.label: Year
inputs.businessContext: The year for which to calculate depreciation (1-based index).

businessContext_i18n.en: The year for which to calculate depreciation (1-based index).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
